name: Iter19 — Batch review gracefully handles all PRs failing
description: When all PR URLs submitted to batch review fail to load (non-existent repos), the app shows error indicators for each PR and a summary of 0 successful reviews — no crash, no blank screen.

planSteps.description: Paste these three URLs into the batch textarea, one per line: https://github.com/this-user-does-not-exist-xyz/fake-repo/pull/1 and https://github.com/another-fake-user-abc/private-repo/pull/99 and https://github.com/nonexistent-org-zyx/missing/pull/500
Verify a loading or progress indicator appears while the batch runs
Verify after completion each PR row shows an error or failure indicator — not a successful review card
Verify the app does not crash and the page remains interactive — the user can still navigate away
